title: glaucium grandiflorum var. haussknechtii
intro: Glaucium grandiflorum var. haussknechtii is a variety of the Glaucium grandiflorum plant, commonly known as the "Scandola poppy" or "Bitter poppy", which is a flowering plant in the poppy family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate the immune system and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Glaucium grandiflorum var. haussknechtii include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its antioxidant properties which can help protect against cell damage. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tincture or tea, and has been traditionally used to treat a range of ailments, although its safety and efficacy have not been extensively scientifically studied.
